allow:
Read(//Users/mateuszzadorozny/Astro/emdash-cms-pl/benchmark/NR>1 && $1 >= "2026-04-03T21:00" && $2=="cf" {
  hour=substr\($1,1,13\)
  min=substr\($1,15,2\)+0
  if \(min==0\) type="COLD"; else type="WARM"
  sum[type]+=$8; cnt[type]++
  bkey=hour":"sprintf\("%02d",min\)
  bsum[bkey]+=$8; bcnt[bkey]++
} END {
  print "=== CF Cold vs Warm \(all bursts\) ==="
  printf "COLD \(:00\):  avg %d ms  \(n=%d\)\\n", sum["COLD"]/cnt["COLD"], cnt["COLD"]
  printf "WARM \(:01/:02\): avg %d ms  \(n=%d\)\\n", sum["WARM"]/cnt["WARM"], cnt["WARM"]
  printf "Δ:           %+d ms \(%.0f%%\)\\n", sum["COLD"]/cnt["COLD"] - sum["WARM"]/cnt["WARM"], \(sum["COLD"]/cnt["COLD"] - sum["WARM"]/cnt["WARM"]\)*100/\(sum["WARM"]/**)
